title: Help with pensions on your Self Assessment tax return
body: "Find out about tax relief on your private pension contributions and whether you need claim it in your Self Assessment tax return.  Helpsheet for filling in your tax return  Helpsheets provide information which can help you complete certain sections of your Self Assessment tax return.  Use the Pension savings — tax charges (HS345) helpsheet to help you declare:   pension savings tax charges taxable lump sums from overseas pension schemes   HMRC YouTube videos  Watch a YouTube video about paying any tax due on your State Pension if it’s more than your Personal Allowance.  How you pay any tax due on your State Pension if it’s more than your Personal Allowance  You will learn about:   your tax code how to include your pension on your Self Assessment tax return your personal allowance   Watch a recorded webinar about other income and tax reliefs on your online tax return.  Other income and tax reliefs on your online tax return  You will learn about:   declaring income from state and private pensions tax reliefs, including paying into registered pension schemes and overseas pension schemes  "
